# tjs-lang

> A typed JavaScript platform: TJS (a TS-like language with runtime type validation), AJS (a gas-metered VM for executing untrusted agent code), and a single-pass toolchain (transpile + lint + test + docs). Types survive to runtime as contracts, examples, and tests. Inline WASM, monadic errors, safe eval, capability-based sandboxing.

This file is a navigation index for AI agents. It does not contain the docs themselves ‚Äî it points to them. Read the linked files in the order suggested below.

## Read this first (avoids the #1 LLM mistake)

- [CLAUDE-TJS-SYNTAX.md](CLAUDE-TJS-SYNTAX.md) ‚Äî TJS syntax reference. Critical: `function foo(x: 'default')` is NOT a TypeScript string-literal type. The colon value is an **example**; `'default'` widens to `string`. LLMs get this wrong constantly.
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) ‚Äî project overview, common commands, architecture, security model, and key APIs.
- [PRINCIPLES.md](PRINCIPLES.md) ‚Äî **non-negotiable language invariants**: options-off TJS ‚äá JS, and TJS ‚äá AJS. A richer layer may do *more* with the same source but must never make subset-legal code illegal (e.g. un-runnable signature tests are inconclusive, not errors). A violation is a bug.

## Language guides

- [DOCS-TJS.md](DOCS-TJS.md) ‚Äî TJS language guide (the long form).
- [DOCS-AJS.md](DOCS-AJS.md) ‚Äî AJS runtime guide (gas-metered sandboxed VM).
- [TJS-FOR-JS.md](TJS-FOR-JS.md) ‚Äî for JavaScript developers: syntax differences, gotchas.
- [TJS-FOR-TS.md](TJS-FOR-TS.md) ‚Äî for TypeScript developers: migration, interop, what changes.
- [guides/tjs.md](guides/tjs.md) and [guides/ajs.md](guides/ajs.md) ‚Äî usage-oriented walkthroughs.
- [guides/patterns.md](guides/patterns.md) ‚Äî common patterns and idioms.
- [guides/tjs-examples.md](guides/tjs-examples.md) ‚Äî annotated example programs.
- [guides/footguns.md](guides/footguns.md) ‚Äî JS footguns TJS quietly fixes (boxed-primitive coercion, ==/!=, typeof null, uninitialized let, etc.).
- [guides/playground-imports.md](guides/playground-imports.md) ‚Äî how the playground resolves `import` statements: TFS service worker, default JSDelivr `/+esm`, esm.sh allowlist for React, CDN hints (`jsdelivr/`, `esmsh/`, `unpkg/`, `github/`), full-URL passthrough.
- [guides/ajs-llm-prompt.md](guides/ajs-llm-prompt.md) ‚Äî prompt template for asking LLMs to write AJS.

## Architecture and internals

- [CONTEXT.md](CONTEXT.md) ‚Äî architecture deep dive (two-layer design, atom system, value resolution).
- [docs/function-predicate-design.md](docs/function-predicate-design.md) ‚Äî Type / Generic / FunctionPredicate design.
- [docs/generic-dts-design.md](docs/generic-dts-design.md) ‚Äî `.d.ts` generation from TJS.
- [docs/WASM-QUICKSTART.md](docs/WASM-QUICKSTART.md) ‚Äî inline WASM, SIMD, `wasmBuffer()` (5-minute intro).
- [DOCS-WASM.md](DOCS-WASM.md) ‚Äî canonical WASM reference: both inline `wasm{}` blocks and top-level `wasm function` declarations, memory model, cross-file composition (Phase 3), boundary distribution form (Phase 4), tjs-lang/linalg, current limitations.
- [wasm-library-plan.md](wasm-library-plan.md) ‚Äî cross-file WASM library design + phased implementation history. Shipped in v0.8.0; see plan for what's deferred.
- [docs/native-engine-integration.md](docs/native-engine-integration.md) ‚Äî embedding into a native runtime.

## Examples and live code

- [examples/](examples/) ‚Äî standalone `.tjs` example files (`hello.tjs`, `datetime.tjs`, `generic-demo.tjs`, `js-footguns-fixed.tjs`).
- [tjs-src/](tjs-src/) ‚Äî the TJS runtime, written in TJS itself (self-hosting reference).
- Playground: https://tjs-platform.web.app ‚Äî try TJS in a browser.

## Package entry points (what to import)

- `tjs-lang` ‚Üí `src/index.ts` ‚Äî main entry: `Agent`, `AgentVM`, `ajs`, `tjs`.
- `tjs-lang/lang` ‚Üí `src/lang/transpiler.ts` ‚Äî language tools only: `tjs`, `transpile`.
- `tjs-lang/lang/from-ts` ‚Üí `src/lang/emitters/from-ts.ts` ‚Äî TypeScript ‚Üí TJS/JS transpilation.
- `tjs-lang/vm` ‚Üí `src/vm/index.ts` ‚Äî VM and atoms.
- `tjs-lang/eval` ‚Üí `src/lang/eval.ts` ‚Äî `Eval`, `SafeFunction`.
- `tjs-lang/batteries` ‚Üí `src/batteries/index.ts` ‚Äî LM Studio integration (lazy, local-only).
- `tjs-lang/linalg` ‚Üí `src/linalg/index.tjs` ‚Äî SIMD linear-algebra kernels (`dot`, `norm_sq`, `dot_at`, `norm_sq_at`).

## Source map (for code-reading agents)

- `src/lang/parser.ts` ‚Äî TJS parser (colon shorthand, safety markers, return-type extraction).
- `src/lang/parser-transforms.ts` ‚Äî Type / Generic / FunctionPredicate block transforms.
- `src/lang/emitters/js.ts` ‚Äî emits JavaScript with `__tjs` metadata.
- `src/lang/emitters/from-ts.ts` ‚Äî TypeScript ‚Üí TJS/JS, including class metadata.
- `src/lang/emitters/dts.ts` ‚Äî `.d.ts` generation.
- `src/lang/runtime.ts` ‚Äî TJS runtime: monadic errors, `checkType`, `createRuntime`.
- `src/lang/inference.ts` ‚Äî infer `TypeDescriptor` from example values.
- `src/lang/json-schema.ts` ‚Äî JSON Schema from `TypeDescriptor`.
- `src/lang/wasm.ts` ‚Äî WASM bytecode emission. Multi-function module composition; wasm-to-wasm `call <index>` resolution; per-function index map for cross-call resolution (v0.8.0).
- `src/lang/emitters/js-wasm.ts` ‚Äî JS bootstrap emitter for compiled wasm modules (one `WebAssembly.compile` per file).
- `src/lang/module-loader.ts` ‚Äî transpile-time `.tjs`/`.ts`/`.js` module loader; used by cross-file `wasm function` composition (v0.8.0).
- `src/linalg/index.tjs` ‚Äî `tjs-lang/linalg` stdlib source (v0.8.0).
- `src/lang/linter.ts` ‚Äî static analysis (unused vars, unreachable code).
- `src/vm/runtime.ts` ‚Äî atom implementations, expression sandboxing, fuel charging (security-critical, ~3000 lines).
- `src/vm/vm.ts` ‚Äî `AgentVM` class.
- `src/vm/atoms/` ‚Äî individual atom definitions; `batteries.ts` has LLM/vector/store atoms.
- `src/builder.ts` ‚Äî fluent `TypedBuilder` API for constructing AST without source.
- `src/cli/tjs.ts` ‚Äî CLI: `check`, `run`, `types`, `emit`, `convert`, `test`.

## Common gotchas

- `tjs(source)` returns `{ code, types, metadata, testResults, ... }`. Use `.code` for the transpiled JS string.
- Errors are `MonadicError` (check with `isMonadicError()`), not native `Error`. Errors are returned, not thrown.
- AJS: `null.foo.bar` returns `undefined` (uses `?.` semantics) ‚Äî does NOT throw like JS.
- AJS: computed member access with variables (`items[i]`) is a transpile-time error; use `.map`/`.reduce` atoms.
- Native TJS has all safety modes ON by default. `TjsCompat` disables them. `fromTS` output has them OFF unless `TjsStrict` is added.

## Tracking and process

- [TODO.md](TODO.md) ‚Äî open work, organized by area. Move done items to the **Completed** section.
- [PLAN.md](PLAN.md) ‚Äî roadmap.
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md) ‚Äî session-completion checklist (canonical). Hard rule: not done until `git push` succeeds.
- [README.md](README.md) ‚Äî public-facing pitch.
